name: Eburny Property Solutions
description: Designs, produces and distributes Africa’s best-selling, durable and economical charcoal and wood clean cookstoves. Over 650,000 stoves sold since 2013, employs 225 staff in Kenya and East Africa.
website_content:
Cookie Policy
We and our business partners use cookies, (including first and third party cookies, pixels and similar technologies (collectively “cookies”) for a number of purposes, including to enhance your browsing experience, analyze traffic to our site, customize content and advertising, and provide social media features. By using this website, you agree to our use of cookies. For more information, please read our [Privacy Policy](https://www.burn.com/en-us/privacy-policy/) and [Cookie Policy](https://www.burn.com/en-us/cookies-policy/). You can manage your cookie preferences and our use of cookies[here.](javascript:void\(0\);) [ ](https://www.burn.com/en-us/)

tavily.answer:
The official website for BURN is https://www.burnstoves.com, which offers eco-friendly cookstoves and carbon credits. The other sites listed are not the official BURN website.
Burn is a UK-based company specializing in digital marketing and customer experience, founded in 2005 with 11-50 employees. Burns Engineering, Inc. is a US engineering firm providing specialized services, founded in 1960 with 201-500 employees. Burn Boot Camp focuses on fitness and wellness, founded in 2012 with 501-1,000 employees.
Burns Funding is a financial services company founded in 2019, offering credit repair and financing. BURN Manufacturing focuses on clean cooking solutions in Africa. Crunchbase is a platform for startup information.
Wellfound is a job board for startups, criticized for poor support and account bans, but offers extensive candidate pools and AI-driven recruiting tools.
Dealroom is a venture capital intelligence platform offering data on companies and deals, with a focus on startups and high-growth firms. It provides verified financial estimates and market trends. The platform is used by VCs and corporate teams for research and deal tracking.
